title: Feature Request: Show sum in Excel-Export for Mirrorcolum instead of all the single vaues
excerpt:
We use Monday.com for our Budgetplanning each year. 
We therefore use mirror colums, that link the values from different boards in our Budget-board.

posts.author: Mondayuser3 (Julia Klingner)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use Monday.com for our Budgetplanning each year.
We therefore use mirror colums, that link the values from different boards in our Budget-board.

We usually send an Excel-Export to our Management Board.
Unfortuantely, the mirror colum does not show the sum of all values in the excel. Instead, there is a list with all single values.

E.g.: We use Google Ads for 150 Dollar per Month. That means, we have in our ‘Advertising-Boad’ 12 items with each 150 Dollar. In our ‘Budgetplanning-Board’ we only have 1 item, where all the 12 other items are linked. The Budget Board in Monday shows a sum of 1.800 Dollar.
However, in my Excel-Export is not stated 1.800 Dollar. Instead there is 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 150,00 .
Everytime I export an actual Excel for our Management Board, I need to correct all the values manually.

So I would really appreciate, if you take this feature request to your roadmap!

Thank you!
